question: The secretary filling in at the reception desk has been performing so well that management is considering offering her a ______ position.
The sales manager often takes the employees in his team out to dinner ______ his own expense.
There ______ some speculation among reporters that Governor Angela Gray may not show up at her weekly press briefing tomorrow.
According to the sign posted in front of the main office, the repair center is now ______ new management.
Participants are welcome to ______ important questions with the seminar leader at any time during the presentation.
The new advertising campaign has already proven to be much more effective ______ the previous one.
Entries for the Science Fair competition should be sent to the Lacefield Community Center ______ June 17 at the latest.
Health inspections are conducted ______ at restaurants throughout the province for the purpose of maintaining high standards of hygiene.
Once ______ into the program, interns will go through an orientation course designed to familiarize them with the division's procedures.
______ wanting to apply for maternity leave should let their immediate supervisor know about their plans at least one month in advance.
By clicking on the web-link below, you will ______ your customer account with Johnson's Online Shopping.
Since June 2006, the customer relations department ______ over 50 complaints from clients.
King's Technical College, which was founded in 1611, is the ______ educational institution in the region.
Recent statistics indicate that young people are becoming more interested in ______ a career in the hospitality industry.
There will be several breaks ______ the day in order to give conference attendees time to get refreshments and use the bathroom facilities.
The management at Gina's Tropical resort would like to remind guests to search ______ room for personal belongings before checking out at reception.
______ merchandise has been packaged and is now ready to be transported from the warehouse to the retail outlets.
To gain access to confidential company documents, employees require ______ from the operations manager.
In order to ______ a yearly growth rate of six percent, we'll need to expand our product line while increasing the size of our investment.
There is a ______ in the agreement for either side to back out of the deal if certain terms are not fulfilled.
Next year, our agent in Shanghai will be in charge ______ distributing our products throughout China.
Mr. Burroughs ______ in the human resources division for 25 years by the time he leaves the company next month.
Many candidates for Duostand Co. were pleased to see the application process ______ on the company website.
We can either drive to the community center to attend the lecture ______ listen to it on the Internet.
In next month's issue, we ______ coupons was offering a steep discount for new subscriptions only.
Our legal advisor suggested that it would be in our best interests to ______ the lawsuit as quickly as possible.
One of our most ______ workers, Charles always completes his tasks ahead of team schedule.
After the earthquake, the building was ______ unsafe since its foundation was badly damaged.
The presenter showed a series of slides ______ detailed the results of her year-long study.
An important ______ for this position is the ability to speak both Spanish and English.
The waitress said there weren't any tables open, but she would call my name once one became ______.
Analysts regarded the ______ between the construction giants a win-win situation for both companies.
Actually, the Department of Transportation is responsible ______ approving roadwork permits in the county.
Wedding cakes are the chef's ______, but he also creates wonderful Italian pasta dishes.
Once we receive verification that the shipment has been delivered, we will ______ the remainder of the unpaid bill.
Since we have already ______ on a replacement for Ms. Leung, I think we can remove the topic from the meeting's agenda.
Later this month, Hideki Koiwa will deliver his ______ of the risks and benefits of investing in Chilean stocks.
Bridgeland Holding's ______ is to refrain from commenting on political issues, so we are unable to answer the reporter's questions.
It is becoming ______ more difficult to find designers who are familiar with this software.
For such a large building project, you'll need to take out a massive loan to raise the necessary ______.
